title: Promote the current player milestone to 0.7.0
summary: 0.7.0 promotes the current tested player milestone as the new baseline. The line now carries image slideshow support, the reorganized plugin UI, sane 75 percent startup volume defaults, right-stick volume bumps, and hosted-root spatial audio.
changes: Promote the currently tested 0.6.x recovery and polish line to the 0.7.0 milestone boundary without adding new runtime behavior beyond the already-tested seam.
Keep slideshow timing, plugin UI reorganization, startup volume defaults, right-stick volume bumps, and hosted-root spatial audio in the new baseline.
Leave Favorites as the next 0.7.x capability lane built on top of this milestone instead of folding it into older transport recovery work.
reasoning: The current player line has crossed the threshold from incremental 0.6.x recovery slices into a real new milestone. The right move is to freeze the tested seam under a new version boundary so the next work, especially Favorites, builds from a stable baseline instead of from a long tail of tiny transport fixes.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: The live raw player seam is now versioned as 0.7.0 alpha.
The tested quality-of-life and audio improvements from the latest 0.6.x slices are now treated as the baseline player, not as provisional follow-ups.
knownIssues: Favorites is not part of this milestone and remains the next capability lane.
This promotion does not itself add new runtime behavior beyond the already-tested seam it names.
verification: Build and deploy the raw dev_deploy seam as asset_dev_player.0.7.0.alpha.assetbundle, plugin_player_dev.0.7.0.alpha.dll, and scene_dev_player.0.7.0.alpha.json.
Keep the matching operator conversation log and validation receipt under the 0.7.0 release shelf.
